sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109531" key="u(pofulaki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποφῠλ-ᾰκία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n109531.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">office of deputy</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρχιφύλαξ,</foreign> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">489.16</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Oenoanda</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
